# Outreach Templates

## Email 1 — VP Sales (Awareness)
Subject: Quick question about {{company_name}}'s quote follow-up process

Body: Hi {{first_name}}, most sales teams are great at quoting but terrible at following up. I find 3-4 quick wins that add 15-20% to close rates. Free 15-minute audit for {{company_name}}. Worth 15 minutes?

## Email 2 — RevOps Director (Awareness)  
Subject: {{company_name}} quote-to-close gap?

Body: Hi {{first_name}}, RevOps leaders tell me their biggest blind spot isn't pipeline — it's what happens between "quote sent" and "deal closed." I can map the exact gap for {{company_name}} in 15 minutes.

## Email 3 — Sales Ops Leader (Awareness)
Subject: The follow-up gap at {{company_name}}

Body: Hi {{first_name}}, sales ops teams spend weeks on CRM hygiene but the biggest revenue leak is invisible: quotes sent and never followed up. 15-minute audit using data you already have.
